products.name: Border Neighbor Threat Index
products.freshness: Scheduled two-hour publication; coverage gates may retain the last accepted snapshot.
products.provenance: Open RSS and Atom reporting; each retained signal carries its source URL, publication time, country attribution, and threat category.
products.forecastLimitations: Trend and forecast views are not approved as evidence of predictive performance. Treat outputs as time-bound analytical estimates, not facts or guarantees.

products.name: MENA Threat Index
products.coverage: 24 Middle East and North Africa states
products.freshness: Scheduled two-hour publication; source, schema, and coverage gates may defer a run.
products.provenance: Curated multilingual feeds plus a Google News layer; source, collection time, weighting, and append-only country and composite histories are retained.
products.forecastLimitations: The 24-hour path uses declared predictive intervals and remains uncertain. Uneven coverage, categorization noise, and short histories limit interpretation.

products.name: World Threat Index
products.coverage: 195 UN member states plus Taiwan, and 13 geopolitical blocs
products.freshness: Tiered reassessment targets roughly 2, 6, or 12 hours; publication gates may retain the prior snapshot.
products.provenance: Open news RSS by country with optional GDELT enrichment; published records retain source context and deterministic category-weight scoring.
products.forecastLimitations: No forecast-performance evidence is approved. Scores describe observed reporting pressure and current assessment; they do not guarantee future conditions.
